title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, the factory-building game, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. This demonstrates the model's ability to handle complex, multi-step planning and execution in a dynamic game environment.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 playing Factorio autonomously, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. The factory-building game serves as a testbed for multi-step planning and execution in a dynamic environment. The takeaway: the model can sustain complex, sequential reasoning to construct a working automated system on its own.
